vision_report.narrative_description: I have performed a meticulous audit of the provided image sequence. My first action was to establish the baseline registry and compare it against the visual evidence in the earliest image. Upon validation, I confirmed that the plants were already absent or non-viable at the start of the sequence. Subsequent images confirm that no biological activity has occurred. The desk environment contains non-botanical debris (spoon, bottle) and the white rabbit anchor, but the botanical components are entirely absent. The biome is currently a sterile, non-productive set of pots.
